allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: use static linking for musl to eliminate libgcc runtime dependency

Change RUSTFLAGS from -crt-static to +crt-static so binaries are fully
statically linked. This removes the need for libgcc in the runtime image
and prevents missing shared library errors at deploy time.
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
release: bump version to v0.3.0

- Update workspace version and internal crate dependencies to 0.3.0
- Update Helm chart version and appVersion to 0.3.0
- Fix Docker build: use +crt-static for fully static musl binaries,
  removing the libgcc runtime dependency
EOF
\)")
